ddls:
CREATE TABLE "chemical_components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chemical component */,
  "component_name" TEXT /* Name of the chemical component */,
  "cas_number" TEXT /* CAS number of the chemical component */,
  "chemical_formula" TEXT /* Chemical formula of the component */,
  "hazard_class" TEXT /* Hazard class (e.g., flammable, toxic) */,
  "hazard_statement" TEXT /* Standardized hazard statements (e.g., H220, H300) */,
  "precautionary_statement" TEXT /* Precautionary statements (e.g., P210, P260) */,
  "msds_link" TEXT /* Link to the Material Safety Data Sheet (MSDS) for more detailed information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "control_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each control parameter type */,
  "parameter_type" TEXT /* Type of control parameter (e.g., TWA, STEL, TWAEV) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., ppm, mg/m3) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the control parameter */,
  "default_value" REAL /* Default value for the control parameter */,
  "is_required" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the control parameter is required for compliance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "standards" (
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each standard */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chemical component */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the control parameter type */,
  "control_value" REAL /* Value of the control parameter */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region where the standard is applicable */,
  "date_adopted" TEXT /* Date when the standard was adopted */,
  "date_effective" TEXT /* Date when the standard became effective */,
  "date_revised" TEXT /* Date when the standard was last revised */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the standard (e.g., active, proposed, deprecated) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the standard */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_standards_parameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_id") REFERENCES control_parameters ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_standards_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_standards_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES chemical_components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the region is located */,
  "state_province" TEXT /* State or province within the country */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the region */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person for the region */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "legal_bases" (
  "legal_base_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each legal basis */,
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the standard */,
  "basis_description" TEXT /* Description of the legal basis */,
  "reference" TEXT /* Reference to the specific regulation or code */,
  "date_adopted" TEXT /* Date when the legal basis was adopted */,
  "date_effective" TEXT /* Date when the legal basis became effective */,
  "date_revised" TEXT /* Date when the legal basis was last revised */,
  "legal_jurisdiction" TEXT /* Legal jurisdiction (e.g., federal, state, local) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("legal_base_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_legal_bases_standard_id FOREIGN KEY ("standard_id") REFERENCES standards ("standard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, safety officer, researcher) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed version of the user's password for security */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the user account is active */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the user has administrative privileges */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
